title: Greek Yogurt Fluffy Dessert
description: A light and airy dessert made with Greek yogurt, perfect for warm weather. Serve chilled and garnish with fresh fruit.
instructions: In a ramekin, mix together the Greek yogurt, fluffy marshmallow creme, and sugar until smooth.
Add vanilla extract and mix well.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve chilled, garnished with fresh fruit if desired.
